texto: Besides the practical knowledge which defeat offers there are important personality profits to be taken. Defeat strips away false values and makes you realize what you really want. It stops you from chasing butterflies and puts you to work digging gold.
explicacao: Citação de William M. Marston sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Besides the practical knowledge which defeat offers there are important personality profits to be…” articula sabedoria, failures, mistakes em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e mistakes.
